title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
